arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt to rival West Ham to sign Elye Wahi in a bid to replace Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: According to Fabrice Hawkins, Eintracht Frankfurt are trying to act quickly to sign Elye Wahi (22) as they aim to replace Omar Marmoush (25) who is set to join Manchester City.…

arts.ttl: Preview: Marseille vs. Strasbourg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Marseille and Strasbourg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
